channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Hundreds brave freezing weather in La Paz to line up for affordable food
item.description: Hundreds of Bolivian residents are braving near-freezing temperatures to queue for affordable chicken in La Paz.

item.title: Spain’s World Cup 2026 team preview: Players to watch, group matches, squad
item.description: Led by some outrageously young and talented players, are Spain set to repeat another Euro-World Cup double in 2026?

item.title: Iran 2026 World Cup squad heads to Mexico as US visa dispute erupts
item.description: Iranian officials say a 'large' number of key staff denied visas as the team is set to travel to Mexico.

item.title: Russia says hundreds of Ukrainian drones downed as economic forum ends
item.description: Russia's defence ministry said the drones were downed over 16 areas and regions, including Crimea.

item.title: ‘Cockroach Party’ leader returns to India for first New Delhi protest
item.description: 'Cockroach Party' leader returns to India for first New Delhi protest.

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party rallies at New Delhi for youth protests
item.description: Protesters call for education minister's resignation after exam scandals, symbolizing a lost faith in India's system.

item.title: Israeli forces fatally shoot Palestinian infant, wound parents in West Bank
item.description: Violence in the West Bank has escalated since Israel began its war on Gaza in 2023.

item.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, 15-year-old sensation, called up to India’s T20 squad
item.description: Fresh off his heroics in the IPL, teenage sensation Sooryavanshi could become the youngest-ever debutant for India.

item.title: Jordan World Cup 2026 preview: Players to watch, group matches and squad
item.description: Jordan make their first World Cup appearance after recently making the finals at the 2023 Asian Cup and 2025 Arab Cup.

item.title: Ebola border shutdown leaves goods rotting between Uganda and DRC
item.description: Ebola border shutdown leaves goods rotting between Uganda and DRC

item.title: ‘Badge of honour’: Israeli settlers shrug off global condemnation
item.description: Activists claim sanctions fail to reflect either the depth of violence or state complicity in settler attacks.

item.title: Supporters of the Cockroach People’s Party hold protest in New Delhi
item.description: CJP organisers rally supporters to demand the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan.

item.title: Man dies in Western Australia after shark attack
item.description: The man was fishing when he was bitten by a shark, police say.

item.title: Mexico zoo animals predict World Cup winners
item.description: Animals at Guadalajara Zoo in Mexico are making their own predictions for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.title: US intercepts Iranian attacks as Israel continues to bomb Lebanon
item.description: US Central Command said seven ballistic missiles were fired towards Kuwait and Bahrain.

item.title: US says Iranian radar sites hit in Goruk and Qeshm Island
item.description: The US military released footage showing what they say are military strikes on Iranian radar sites.

item.title: North Korea’s Kim orders navy to build 10,000-tonne destroyer: State media
item.description: Kim Jong Un has continued to visit military sites before a visit by China's Xi Jinping on Monday and Tuesday.

item.title: What’s new at World Cup 2026? From match ball sensors to AI and robot dogs
item.description: Technology, more specifically AI, will play a big role in the new additions at the upcoming World Cup.

item.title: New York Knicks hold off San Antonio Spurs 105-104 for 2-0 NBA Finals lead
item.description: Spurs in need of an unprecedented comeback when the best-of-seven series shifts to New York for games three and four.

item.title: Israeli soldier shoots Palestinian baby dead near Hebron
item.description: An Israeli soldier has shot and killed seven-month-old Palestinian infant Sam Abu Haikal.

item.title: Arrests of critics in Ghana provokes alarm over free speech under Mahama
item.description: Ghana’s 14 arrests in 16 months linked to false news have raised concerns about free speech.

item.title: Ronaldo joins Portugal training ahead of sixth World Cup appearance
item.description: Portuguese star Cristiano Ronaldo hit the training pitch as he readies for his sixth World Cup appearance.

item.title: Gaza fishermen stay afloat with dinghies made from doorframes
item.description: Fishermen in Gaza are using dinghies made of reclaimed fiberglass, wood, and doorframes salvaged from rubble.

item.title: Iran war live: Iranian missiles target Kuwait, Bahrain after US-Iran clash
item.description: Israel kills two Lebanese army officers, one soldier, and issues more forced displacement orders for southern Lebanon.

item.title: Trump makes pitch to farmers hard-hit by tariffs, high prices in Wisconsin
item.description: Trump seeks to shore up support among rural voters hard-hit by tariffs, economic fallout of war with Iran.
